hero.subtitle: Next-generation platform for personal trainers. CRM, workout builder, analytics and AI assistant — all in one workspace.

testimonials.name: Maria K.
testimonials.text: Stopped using Excel for clients — everything in one window, saving 5+ hours a week.

testimonials.name: Alexey T.
testimonials.text: Clients actually use the app: workouts, chat, measurements — no extra messengers.

testimonials.name: Elena V.
testimonials.text: Analytics and finances are finally tied to the schedule. I see churn risk before clients leave.

product.title: Professional trainer workspace
product.text: Everything you need to run your business — in one window. No Excel spreadsheets or lost chats.

features.title: Workout builder
features.text: Drag-and-drop interface. 30+ base exercises, custom moves, AI recommendations and program templates.

features.title: Trainer CRM
features.text: Full client card with workout history, measurement progress, payment history and trainer notes.

features.title: Revenue analytics
features.text: Revenue charts, client retention, workout stats. Excel export for taxes.

features.title: Smart calendar
features.text: Schedule workouts and consultations. Auto reminders 2h and 30 min before sessions.

features.title: Built-in chat
features.text: Async messaging with clients, message templates, file attachments up to 10 MB.

features.title: AI assistant
features.text: Generate programs, analyze progress, nutrition tips and automatic reports.

workflow.title: Weekly plan in minutes
workflow.text: The builder should be a real tool: catalog exercises, custom moves, sets, reps, rest, video and client assignment.

analytics.title: Reports that help run your practice
analytics.text: Analytics is not decorative: active clients, period revenue, calendar load, client progress and PDF reports.

mobile.title: Clients see program, progress and trainer connection
mobile.text: Mobile should be fast and clear: today’s workout, week, measurements, progress photos, chat and payment history.

pricing.title: أسعار بسيطة وشفافة
pricing.text: Start free, upgrade to Pro when ready. No hidden fees.

cta.title: Move clients, programs and payments into one workflow
cta.text: 14 days free, no card. Demo trainer account is ready to explore the real workflow.
